description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sw that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: windows, linux, and macos. Each job should check out the repository, run the sw-action, and upload the resulting binaries as artifacts. The windows job runs on a windows-2022 environment, the linux job runs in a fedora:36 container on an ubuntu-20.04 environment, and the macos job runs on a macos-12 environment.
